subject: FW: April 4 NYC MIND08
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Adam Bly [mailto:bly@seedmediagroup.com] 
Sent: Friday, March 21, 2008 8:47 PM
To: Adam Bly
Subject: April 4 NYC MIND08

Dear friends,

I hope you can join us on April 4 in NYC for MIND08, a symposium I'm
co-hosting with Paola Antonelli from MoMA, tied to the new exhibition
Design
and the Elastic Mind. Here are the details: http://www.mind08.com.

This event is free and open to the public and so we are trying to make
sure
that our friends and subscribers are guaranteed a place (we only have
capacity for 500). If you would like to attend and have not already
registered online please let me know and we will take care of your
registration.

Should be a really fun day!

Best regards, 
Adam
